content.en:
As the chief disciple of the official disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect, Mo En is also a true disciple, and his strength even surpasses that of many core disciples.

In the Imperial Beast Sect, he had even defeated many True Ancestor-level genius disciples, and his strength had reached a terrifying level, if it weren't for the cultivation of some kind of secret technique, he would have already stepped into the ranks of True Ancestors.

Now, he has become an abyssal monster, but his strength is even more terrifying than before.

Even, he could impact the Abyss Lord level now, but he didn't do it, because once he did, he would be a top Abyss Lord at most in the future, although he had the hope of impacting the Abyss Overlord, it would be difficult to go too far!

Why is it so difficult to rush out of the Infinite Abyss, and even any Supreme Dao Ancestor can easily sweep the entire Infinite Abyss?

That's because it's easy for abyss monsters to be promoted to lords, but it's very difficult to promote to abyss overlords, and ordinary abyss overlords are at most comparable to two Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and there are too few abyss overlords comparable to five or six Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

He didn't want to be limited to the Abyss Overlord who was only comparable to the Second and Third Heavens, because he had been laying the foundation and wanted to refine the evolutionary bloodline.

According to the research of the Royal Beast Sect, the abyss monsters are also divided into ordinary abyss monster bloodlines and top abyss monster bloodlines, and what he now has is the top abyss monster bloodline, which is a standard noble bloodline, but above the noble bloodline, there is also the overlord bloodline and the top overlord bloodline.

He is now only one step away from evolving his bloodline to the overlord bloodline, once he completes it, it will not be difficult to achieve the abyss overlord in the future, if he has the opportunity to raise the bloodline to the top abyss overlord bloodline level, he can easily be promoted to the level of five or six Dao Ancestors in the future, and even have a glimmer of hope to become a supreme Dao Ancestor.

In addition, it is not suitable to be promoted to the Abyss Lord now, and if it is forcibly promoted, it will damage the foundation.

Therefore, before the heavens and the earth have not changed greatly, it is better to maintain the strength of the abyss monsters.

But even if he wasn't an Abyss Lord, he was sure that he would save his life in front of the True Abyss Lord, and ordinary half-step True Ancestors and even top-of-the-line half-step True Ancestors were like ants in his eyes.

"If I make a move, no matter how many half-step True Ancestors I have, there is only one way to die!"

Morn said confidently.

Morn set out from his palace and began to search for the half-step True Ancestors of the Quasi-Dao Realm.

There were a lot of half-step True Ancestors, and he knew the Infinite Abyss very well, so it was not difficult to find them.

In a short time, he found a team of three hundred half-step True Ancestors.

......

"There's an abyss monster flying towards us in front, be careful, maybe it's a disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect!"

"Hahaha, what if it's a disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect, we have a total of three hundred half-step True Ancestors, and even Lord Qianyuan True Monarch, even a few disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect have to die!"

Although this team is a miscellaneous team, it has four transcendent forces, the Qianyuan True Monarch of Daoshan.

Dao Shan is one of the four transcendent forces, any half-step true ancestor is very powerful, and Qianyuan True Monarch is known as the third half-step true ancestor of Dao Mountain, and his strength far exceeds that of other half-step true ancestors.

With him leading this team, coupled with the advantage of numbers, they are not afraid of the disciples of the Royal Beast Sect, as long as they are careful, they are enough to kill the disciples of the Royal Beast Sect.

Just as Mo En arrived, Qianyuan Zhenjun ordered: "Shoot them all!"

He was not arrogant, he was not careful, even if this abyssal monster was not a disciple of the Royal Beast Sect, they had nothing to lose.

Thundered!!!!

One after another, the attacks of the Origin Divine Power and the Chaos Divine Power hit Morn.

But suddenly, Morn's figure disappeared.

"Be careful!"

Qianyuan Zhenjun reminded loudly.

"Ahh

A half-step True Ancestor suddenly screamed, only to see his body being torn in half, and the abyssal demonic qi continued to invade his body and soul, annihilating his vitality in the blink of an eye.

A half-step True Ancestor has fallen!

With a scream, a half-step True Ancestor died, but they didn't find Morn's figure.

Such a scene is simply weird!

"Come out for me!"

Qianyuan Zhenjun held a long sword in his hand, burst out with all his strength, and stabbed into the void with a sword.

The void shook, and a figure was shaken out.

"It's funny, you were able to spot me!"

Morn was a little surprised.

His method of merging into the Void was a kind of Origin Divine Power, and it was a Void Divine Power that he had specially created for the body of the Abyss Demon, which could be perfectly integrated into the Void.

The space of the Infinite Abyss was extremely stable, so once it was integrated into the void, it would be difficult for a half-step True Ancestor to find it.

But Qianyuan Zhenjun was able to cut out his position with a sword and force him out, which is rare.

"I just happened to have mastered an insight-type origin supernatural power!"

Qianyuan Zhenjun said in a condensed voice.

He was also nervous, judging from the current situation, Morn's strength was above him, but he couldn't say exactly how powerful.

But he definitely couldn't let Mo En kill a half-step True Ancestor, otherwise if the other half-step True Ancestors were all dead, he would be the only one left who would not be Mo En's opponent at all.

"Find out my traces, so what, you still have to die! Dare to hunt and kill the disciples of our Imperial Beast Sect, you will definitely die!"

Morn said angrily.

The next moment.

His body became incomparably larger, like a mountain, and the terrifying power seemed to crush the space of the Infinite Abyss.

I saw that Morn's claws turned into an invincible weapon, grabbing a half-step true ancestor.

Under this grasp, the void was imprisoned, and a half-step true ancestor could not escape, and was caught to death one by one!

"Not good!"

Qianyuan Zhenjun was terrified.

He had also joined forces with other half-step True Ancestors to kill a Royal Beast Sect disciple before, but that Imperial Beast Sect disciple was not comparable to the Imperial Beast Sect disciple in front of him at all.

This Imperial Beast Sect disciple in front of him is too powerful, far surpassing the other Imperial Beast Sect disciples!

Escape!

Gotta escape!

If he doesn't run away, I'm afraid he'll die.

Then, just as he was fleeing some distance, a claw broke through the void and slammed into him.

In an instant, Qianyuan Zhenjun's body shattered into many pieces, and although he recovered his body, his injuries were difficult to recover.

Under this blow, Qianyuan Zhenjun was seriously injured and dying!

The second blow soon came again, and this time Qianyuan Zhenjun used a life-saving thing, and finally saved his life.

Chasing and fleeing, the other half-step True Ancestors were torn apart almost in a short period of time, and Qianyuan Zhenjun did not completely escape, the other party's speed was too fast, and he easily crossed the void of great distances.

Finally, Qianyuan Zhenjun was caught up again.

Suddenly, an enchantment appeared around Qianyuan Zhenjun, and he could no longer escape.

"Disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect, you dare to kill me, I am a true disciple of the transcendent power Dao Mountain, if you kill me, our Dao Mountain will definitely destroy your Imperial Beast !!Sect one day," Qianyuan Zhenjun threatened.

"Hehe, Dao Mountain, it's just a pseudo five-fold heaven force, and our Imperial Beast Sect is the real five-heaven force, and our Imperial Beast Sect is almost the same as destroying your Dao Mountain!"

Mo En didn't take Qianyuan Zhenjun's threat to heart, and quickly killed him completely.
